# Rankers Edge

> Cinematic JEE prep hub — PYQs, mocks, an infinite Maths question bank and an AI tutor. Built for deep thinkers and quiet rebels.

Rankers Edge is a focused study platform for JEE Mains and JEE Advanced aspirants. It brings together previous-year question banks, full and chapter-wise mock tests, an infinite adaptive Maths drill, and an on-demand AI tutor — all behind a single calm interface.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Cinematic landing with an AI tutor search bar.
- [Study Resources](/resources): Eight hand-picked JEE prep tools.
- [AI Tutor](/ai-tutor): Ask any JEE concept, problem or derivation.
- [About Developer](/about): The story behind Rankers Edge and the developer's other platforms.

## Resources
- [Infinity Question Bank](/resource/infinity-maths): Never-ending adaptive Maths drills.
- [Chapter-wise Test Series](/resource/chapter-pyqs): Chapter-by-chapter PYQ practice.
- [JEE Mains PYQ Series](/resource/jee-mains-pyq): Year-wise JEE Mains papers.
- [JEE Advanced PYQ Series](/resource/jee-adv-pyq): Year-wise JEE Advanced archive.
- [AI Personal Tutor](/resource/ai-teacher): Chapter-level AI tutor.
- [JEE Mains Mocks](/resource/mains-mock-full): Institute-grade full mocks.
- [JEE Mains Chapter Mocks](/resource/mains-mock-chapter): Non-PYQ chapter drilling.
- [JEE Advanced Mocks](/resource/adv-mock-full): Pattern-true Advanced mocks.

## Optional
- [Sign in](/login): Optional account for saving progress.
